name: Greenhouse
description: Greenhouse is a strategic design agency that emphasizes the importance of collaboration and a strong brand vision. With a team of in-house experts, they focus on building brands through tailored insights and a comprehensive marketing approach.

name: Greenhouse Agency, Inc
description: Green House is a creative engagement agency that specializes in marketing and advertising solutions, focusing on measurable metrics to enhance brand growth. Their comprehensive services and innovative strategies ensure effective brand engagement across various platforms.

name: The Greenhouse People Ltd
description: The company provides free and impartial advice on planning, purchasing, and assembling new greenhouses, highlighting their commitment to customer support. They also emphasize prompt delivery and helpful service, enhancing the overall customer experience.

name: Top Greenhouses
description: Top Greenhouses is dedicated to maximizing agricultural and economic yields through meticulous planning and state-of-the-art greenhouse designs. Their structures incorporate advanced crop-growing technologies and are engineered to withstand severe weather, ensuring optimal conditions for diverse crops.

name: Bridge Greenhouses
description: Bridge specializes in providing bespoke greenhouses and optimal vertical farming solutions, leveraging the latest horticultural methods and technology to ensure high-quality projects. Their partnership with Urban Crop Solutions further enhances their ability to support both start-up and enterprise growers throughout the entire process.

name: Greenhouse Partners
description: Greenhouse Partners emphasizes a holistic approach to branding and innovation, which is central to their mission of fostering great cultures that lead to enduring brands. The company's founder, Pete, established a "Whole Brand" model that remains crucial for developing lasting brands today.

name: Juliana Group Ltd
description: Greenhouses.com, the online retail division of the Juliana Group, offers a wide range of greenhouses suitable for any garden size, from small models for herbs to large structures for family use. With brands like Halls and Juliana, they provide high-quality greenhouses backed by a 12-year guarantee, ensuring customers can buy with confidence directly from the manufacturer.

name: Rough Brothers Inc
description: Prospiant is the largest North American provider of large-scale commercial greenhouses and cultivation structures, offering expertise in designing and building complete greenhouse ecosystems tailored to unique business needs. Their focus on sustainable and cost-effective solutions makes them a key player in the cannabis greenhouse market.

name: Greener Solutions
description: Greener Solutions specializes in multispan greenhouses and agricultural solutions, offering a variety of greenhouse products designed by Richel, France. With over 25 years of experience, the company focuses on enhancing food security and promoting self-sufficiency through innovative greenhouse technologies and systems.

name: A-SERA GROUP
description: A-SERA GROUP is a leading provider of greenhouse construction materials and one of the top greenhouse manufacturers in the region, emphasizing the importance of productivity and functionality in their modern greenhouse complexes. They also offer a free pre-construction project assessment service.
